name: paulkuo.tw
description: Paul Kuo's personal brand website with AI-accessible content tools

tools.name: get_paul_profile
tools.description: Returns Paul Kuo's detailed profile including background, expertise, and social links

tools.name: search_articles
tools.description: Search articles by keyword, filter by content pillar, with configurable result limit

tools.name: get_expertise_areas
tools.description: Browse five content pillars. When pillar is specified, also returns recent articles in that pillar.

tools.name: get_project_portfolio
tools.description: Returns Paul's active projects and tools

tools.name: contact_paul
tools.description: Returns contact information and opens email client
